creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

> … Eventually I realised: whilst single clicks fail, double-clicks succeed. …

… and today I realised that whilst I can double-click on the number, the number (the zoom percentage) can not be changed. 

I imagine that this bug is specific to FreeBSD; if you suspect not, let me know and I can re-file at <https://github.com/ksnip/ksnip/issues>
